name: Andrew Gillum
subject: @realDonaldTrump
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3646/9e00690/526b1fe3/240018b3/3344951263/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181020_TrumpTweet2_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx&source=em18_181020_TrumpTweet2_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx")
Friends,

Earlier today, Donald Trump attacked me, my record, and my city on Twitter -- but he didn't have the courage to tag me.

And no, this wasn't the first time.

These attacks show us that we've got Ron DeSantis and Donald Trump right where we want them in these last weeks: They're so scared of our people-powered movement that they're stooping to weak attacks on Twitter, via sub-tweet.

But we're not going to stoop to their level. **When they go low, we go vote.**

**[Ron DeSantis may be counting on Donald Trump to fight his battles and help win this election for him, but I'm counting on you. Will you chip in $5 or more now?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3646/9e00690/526b1fe3/2400194b/3344951263/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-rapidresponse?gpsid=13_55_4600&refcode=em18_181020_TrumpTweet2_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181020_TrumpTweet2_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+Ron+DeSantis+may+be+counting+on+Donald+T")**

Since day one, our campaign has been about focusing on the issues that matter.

Tomorrow night, I will debate my opponent for the first time in this general election -- where I will unapologetically share my bold, progressive plans to lead Florida forward. And in the coming weeks, my team and I are going to be busy talking with as many Floridians as possible from each of our state's 67 counties to get out the vote in these final days.

**[While Ron DeSantis campaigns with lies and fear, we're campaigning on changing Florida for the better. So please, chip in $5 now and let's get to work.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3646/9e00690/526b1fe3/2400194a/3344951263/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-rapidresponse?gpsid=13_55_4600&refcode=em18_181020_TrumpTweet2_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181020_TrumpTweet2_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=10+-+While+Ron+DeSantis+campaigns+with+lies+a")**

And to Donald Trump: If you want to lie about my record, then at least have the courage to @ me, don't just sub-tweet.

Bring it home,

Andrew Gillum

name: Team O'Halleran
subject: re: our close race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
I'm confident that this grassroots team can come together and deliver a victory for Arizona families in 17 days. But this news is a reminder that we can take nothing for granted.
Friends, I'm sure you've seen the news below about a Republican poll claiming that our race is tied. Now, I'm confident that this grassroots team can come together and deliver a victory for Arizona families in 17 days. Folks in our district know my record, and because of your [**steadfast support**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.20_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer="), we're making sure that we reach every last undecided voter in AZ-01 before Election Day. But this news is a reminder that we can take nothing for granted, **and we must keep up the fight until the polls close on November 6th.** There is a lot at stake here -- we must keep AZ-01 blue to win the House next month, and Wendy Rogers wants to take away your Social Security -- so I promise I will not let up the fight. Peter, the past two years in Congress have been tough. At every juncture, the Republican majority has refused to stand up to this out-of-control president and fight for health care and working families. But I have hope that things in January could be different. And it starts with candidates like Jessica Morse.
Jessica's opponent, Tom McClintock, has voted to gut health care for millions of families and take away protections for pre-existing conditions. And time after time he has gone along with Republicans as they refuse to hold this president accountable or investigate the massive scandals and corruption around this president and administration. Trust me, they refuse to take even the most basic steps to protect the rule of law.
**I 'll make this simple--we need new leadership in the House, and Jessica is the right woman for the job. She is a dedicated public servant and proven national security professional. We need tough, smart leaders like Jessica in the House--chip in to help her now: **
[$15 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/rxrKMVIRXfR6XSkdLKA5mroDEArX6sPDg8C6ERqOKqI=/BH87yrWU8zFm-ms6Ar9xreGE_Gr-3i3o_uEzPg6ZJYY=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20181021_AS_20181019-as_all_5&amount=5) | [$25 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/rxrKMVIRXfR6XSkdLKA5mroDEArX6sPDg8C6ERqOKqI=/BH87yrWU8zFm-ms6Ar9xreGE_Gr-3i3o_uEzPg6ZJYY=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20181021_AS_20181019-as_all_25&amount=25)

Jessica's background speaks for itself. She's worked around the world for the State Department and USAID, including two years in Baghdad alongside our troops. And if she's elected to the House, she won't need on-the-job training: _Jessica knows how to get things done._

name: Donnelly, Joe
subject: I'm not kidding around
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
A few weeks ago, a poll came out showing that I had a lead in this Senate race. A week later, another poll showed my opponent in the lead. So when I tell you that this race is a true toss-up and what |
---
| | Peter,

A few weeks ago, a poll came out showing that I had a lead in this Senate race.

A week later, another poll showed my opponent in the lead.

**So when I tell you that this race is a true toss-up and**[**what you do will make a difference**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2dba/7377f838/2626c445/51f8bd9a/585255116/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-not-kidding?refcode=20181021.1&amount=20")**\-- I 'm not kidding around.**

The truth is, we could fall behind very quickly. Republicans always have the resources for last-minute ad buys and GOTV campaigns. Just in the last week, both the NRA and President Trump's super PAC announced they were each spending seven figures to buy even more ads.

We don't have resources like they do. Instead, we've got to rely on our grassroots supporters.

I know I've already asked a lot of you, Peter. **But I 'd hate to see us come this far and then fall short in the last few weeks.**

[**Will you rush a donation to help us fight back against the GOP money machine and pull out a win on Election Day?**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2dba/7377f838/2626c445/51f8bd9a/585255116/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-not-kidding?refcode=20181021.1&amount=20")

"Andrew," she'd tell me, "the only thing you should ever ask for in life is a chance."

So tonight, I'm asking for a chance. A chance for all of us to have a state that finally makes health care a right for all. That finally pays our teachers what they're worth. That finally stops this gun violence epidemic.

The first Pennsylvania Senate debate of this election airs at 11:30 this morning.

Here's what we know we'll see. We'll see Bob defending his record of fighting for Pennsylvania families. We'll hear about how he stands up to the Trump administration's most dangerous pieces of legislation, and how he's fighting for middle-class families without question.

And from Bob's opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta, we'll see once again how he's running to be an automatic yes vote for President Trump, not to support Pennsylvanians. Pennsylvania deserves better than Barletta.

Bottom line: Bob Casey is fighting to make Pennsylvanians' lives easier, and Lou Barletta would make their lives harder. Congressman Barletta supports plans which would destroy Social Security, Medicaid and Medicare as we know it. Bob wants to strengthen benefits that Pennsylvanians have earned and deserve.

We're proud to call Bob Casey our senator. We're proud to stand with him as he fights with both fists up for PA, and in 16 days we'll be proud to vote for him. So before the debate airs, we wanted to let you know where we stand. Bob Casey is without a doubt the best choice for Pennsylvania, and we know he'll keep fighting to protect Pennsylvania families.

Thanks,

Team Casey

name: Jody Casey, betofortexas.com
subject: Major endorsements in this race (this is great news)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

We’ve had some really incredible news in the past couple of days and we
wanted to share -- Beto has been endorsed by the following Texas
newspapers:

The Houston Chronicle
The West Texas congressman's command of issues that matter to this
state, his unaffected eloquence and his eagerness to reach out to all
Texans make him one of the most impressive candidates this editorial
board has encountered in many years.

-------------------------------------------

The Longview News-Journal
We want a senator who will work and fight for our state and are
convinced Beto O’Rourke of El Paso will do that.

O’Rourke proposes a different kind of leadership, one that doesn’t run
away from those across the aisle but genuinely tries to work with them
to solve problems.

-------------------------------------------

The Corpus Christi Caller-Times
The likable El Paso congressman has run a positive campaign about
bipartisan solutions, affordable health care and commonsense immigration
reform. Incumbent Republican Ted Cruz is the Senate's least-liked
member.

-------------------------------------------

The San Antonio Express-News
O’Rourke, mindful that Texas leads the nation in the number of
uninsured, wants some form of universal health care that might include a
choice for people, even those in employer-provided plans, to opt into
Medicare even if they’re not yet 65. For every good reason not to vote
for Cruz, there are good reasons to vote for O’Rourke.

This is incredible news, especially given that many of these papers have
historically endorsed Republicans for statewide and nationwide office.

It’s just further proof that Beto is reaching out to ALL Texans --
Republicans, Democrats and Independents alike -- and bringing them into
our people-powered campaign.

With just
16 days to go until Election Day, we need you now more than ever before. A
super PAC just bought $1.6 million worth of negative TV ads attacking Beto
-- and our biggest goal is to raise enough funds to match them, dollar for
dollar. I just checked the numbers, and we’re falling behind where we need
to be.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/11994?refcode=em20181021&t=1019&akid=20108%2E444211%2E3CrET3 ]Please, if you can afford to: give
a contribution of
$3
or more to Beto’s campaign before midnight tonight. Help us reach our goal
and seize the momentum of these powerful endorsements.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/11994?refcode=em20181021&t=1020&akid=20108%2E444211%2E3CrET3 ]Contribute
$3
»

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/11994?refcode=em20181021-img&t=1021&akid=20108%2E444211%2E3CrET3 ]Beto for Texas

At the end of the day, these powerful endorsements from newspapers across
the state of Texas prove what we already know: Beto is the Senator Texas
deserves. He’s only going to win if each of us steps up and works our
hearts out until November 6.

Thank you. Adelante,

Jody Casey
Campaign Manager
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/11994?refcode=em20181021&t=1022&akid=20108%2E444211%2E3CrET3 ]Contribute
$3
»

name: Alexandria Sousa, betofortexas.com
subject: This is BIG, and I want you to be part of it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

The race to elect Beto and unseat Ted Cruz is shaping up to be truly
historic, and the election results will impact millions of lives across
the country. Tomorrow, early voting begins in Texas -- which means our
voter contact efforts just got a lot more urgent. So right now, I’m
inviting you to do something BIG to help in this final sprint. Let me
explain...

What happens in Texas this November will have a tremendous impact on the
rest of the country. The Senate majority hangs in the balance.

Early voting runs from 10/22 - 11/2. To win, we need all hands on deck to
contact Texas voters during this crucial period so we can tell them to
take advantage of early voting!

That’s why we’re inviting you to join our program, “Come Back to Texas.”
Thousands of volunteers are joining together in the largest ‘get out the
vote’ campaign in Texas history.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/come-back-to-texas?source=em20181021&t=1001&akid=20095%2E444211%2EWGZzeq ]If you’re able to join us on the front lines in Texas for the final
weeks of the election, please fill out the form here.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/come-back-to-texas?source=em20181021&t=1002&akid=20095%2E444211%2EWGZzeq ]Come back to Texas

We know it’s a lot to ask, and we wouldn’t bother if it wasn't so
important. If you fill out the form, an organizer on the campaign will
contact you, provide training, assist with trip logistics and connect you
with campaign staff when you arrive in Texas. If finances might be a
barrier, fill out the form anyway. We’ll work with you directly to figure
out how we can support you to get here and volunteer.

If you can’t make it, we understand! [ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/host-event?source=em20181021&t=1003&akid=20095%2E444211%2EWGZzeq ]Another way you can help is by
hosting a phone bank for Beto near you -- fill out the form here.

We’re on the cusp of making history. Right now, we’re in the midst of our
biggest weekend of voter contact so far -- and it’s amazing to be part of.
Everyone working together on the ground in Texas gives me so much hope.
But there are still millions of voters to reach, and we need as many
people as possible to help.

The entire country will be watching what happens in Texas this November.
If enough of us dig deep in these final weeks, we can win.

Thank you for everything so far,

Alexandria Sousa
Distributed Organizing Director
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1031?refcode=ema20181021&t=1004&akid=20095%2E444211%2EWGZzeq ]DONATE
$3

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20181021footer&t=1005&akid=20095%2E444211%2EWGZzeq

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=20095%2E444211%2EWGZzeq

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923
